name: Universal Microwave Technology, Inc.
summary: Universal Microwave Technology, Inc. designs, develops, and manufactures custom microwave/mm-wave devices, sub-systems, and antennas for broadband wireless communications. The company's products comprise diplexers, filters, couplers, OMT products, Eband/millimeter-wave products, distributed antenna systems, hanger clamp sets, Ku/Ka band OMT and filter assemblies, waveguide components, circulators/isolators, cable assemblies, flexible waveguides, antennas, die-casting and machined parts, and remote mount kits. Its products are used in point-to-point, cellular, VSAT, WiMAX, and LTE applications. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Keelung City, Taiwan.
